Title: Xenosaga Episode I: Der Wille zur Macht
FullTitle: Xenosaga Episode I: Der Wille zur Macht
SortTitle: Xenosaga Episode I: Der Wille zur Macht
Plot: Collecting over 4 hours of cinematics from Xenosaga Episode 1, this limited collector's edition DVD is a must-have for Xenosaga fans and newcomers alike.
Tagline: Thousands of years into the future, mankind exists only in deep space.
